===================
===================
=== Bob Dylan 2001-08-16 Wichita aud.txt
===================
===================
===================
 
Bob Dylan and band
16 August 2001
Wichita, Kansas
Century II Convention Center	   
audience recording
-----------------------
lineage: trade cd > eac > flac > upload
info: from olof's still on the road site
comments:  this was the first dylan concert we/i attended. between Dylan's attitude, the setlist and the band, it was a great first experience.  Love and Theft soon came out and within 6 months of this show, we had seen them 3 more times.  hope you enjoy it as much as i did!
--------------------
disk 1
1.Somebody Touched Me (trad.)	   
2.To Ramona	   
3.Visions Of Johanna	   
4.'Til I Fell In Love With You	   
5.Lay Lady Lay	   
6.Tombstone Blues	   
7.It's All Over Now, Baby Blue	   
8.Mama, You Been On My Mind	   
9.Masters Of War	   
10.Everything Is Broken	   
11.Shelter From The Storm	   
12.Cold Irons Bound	   
13.Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat	   
		   
disk 2
14.Love Sick	   
15.Like A Rolling Stone	   
16.Knockin' On Heaven's Door	   
17.All Along The Watchtower	   
18.Blowin' In The Wind
------------------	 
Concert # 1341 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 6 of the 2001 US Summer Tour. 2001 concert # 64. 
Concert # 246 with the 12th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), David Kemper (drums & percussion).
13, 79, 16, 18 acoustic with the band.
5 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
1, 16, 18 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals).
12 new songs (66%) compared to previous concert. 4 new songs for this tour.
Stereo audience recording, 125 minutes. 
Session info updated 19 November 2003.
